/.title: Vive Counselling | Therapy for Adults Across Australia
/.description: Counselling and therapy for adults across Australia. Direct, thoughtful and inclusive support for anxiety, relationships, shame, trauma and sexuality.

/working-with-joel.title: Working with Joel | Vive Counselling
/working-with-joel.description: Meet Joel Griffiths, an ACA-registered counsellor based in Perth. Direct, non-shaming counselling for adults across Australia, including relationships, sexuality, kink and ENM.

/inclusion.title: Kink, ENM and LGBTQIA+ Inclusive Counselling | Vive Counselling
/inclusion.description: Inclusive counselling for adults across Australia, with particular understanding of kink, BDSM, ENM, polyamory and LGBTQIA+ lives. Perth-based and non-shaming.

/inclusion/kink-bdsm.title: Kink & BDSM-Aware Counselling | Vive Counselling
/inclusion/kink-bdsm.description: Kink-aware counselling and therapy for adults across Australia. Perth-based support where kink is understood without being pathologised or made the whole story.

/inclusion/enm-polyamory.title: Counselling for Polyamory, Open Relationships and ENM | Vive Counselling
/inclusion/enm-polyamory.description: Counselling for polyamory, open relationships and ENM across Australia, without assuming monogamy is the answer or treating relationship structure as the problem.

/inclusion/lgbtqia.title: LGBTQIA+ Affirming Counselling | Vive Counselling
/inclusion/lgbtqia.description: LGBTQIA+ affirming counselling for adults across Australia, including identity, relationships, shame, family strain and mental health. Perth-based.

/contact.title: Counselling Fees & Contact | Vive Counselling
/contact.description: Request a free 15-minute initial consultation with Joel Griffiths at Vive Counselling. Counselling sessions are $120; view fees and contact details.
